message:
feat(dns): replace Instant-based TTL tracking with injectable Time source

Continues the ambient time removal effort into the DNS cache subsystem.

- CacheEntry now stores Time instead of std::time::Instant for expiry tracking
- new_at() constructor accepts a Time parameter instead of calling Instant::now()
- is_expired_at() and remaining_ttl_at() accept Time for deterministic testing
- DnsCache gains time_getter field and with_time_getter() constructor
- All cache operations (get, insert, evict) use the configured time source
- Add wall_clock_now() and duration_to_nanos() helpers matching the pattern
  established in discover.rs and connection.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
